emails.product: Standard Handcuff Case (fits most standard hinged or chain handcuffs, non ASP)
emails.shortDescription: Feature the Standard Handcuff Case, built to the client's attached layout (Bleu de Chanel editorial reference: dark hero with big word + ghosted repeat, numbered 01/02/03 callouts, 4 numbered feature cards with buttons, image strip, closing CTA, full bleed panel, logo footer). Rewritten in Zero9 functional/spec voice. Molded Kydex; Standard or Double Standard; Tek-Lok (duty belt) or Molle-Loks (MOLLE vest); eight finishes. No pricing, no warranty.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 8 + exact-layout PNG (Bleu de Chanel). Product verified live + in stock via .js 2026-07-08 (all variants available). 6 images 200. Fits most standard hinged/chain non-ASP cuffs; oversized/leg-iron blades and old small Peerless do not fit. Layout replicated in Zero9 black/white/red, functional voice.
emails.creativeDirection: Replicate attached Bleu de Chanel editorial layout in Zero9 black #0A0A0A / white / red #E62826. Big word hero (CUFF CASE) with ghosted repeats, NewCuffs hero, outlined Shop Now, FIT AND HOLD section with StdCuffBlk + 01/02/03 callouts, BUILD YOURS section with CuffColors + 4 numbered feature cards (Fit/Finishes/Mounting/Single or Double) each with Shop Now, ON DUTY 4-up image strip, closing statement + red Shop Now, full-bleed NewCuffs panel, logo footer.

emails.theme: New Arrival: Body Cam Case for EXO / ARGUS
emails.product: Body Cam Case - EXO/ARGUS (fits Utility/Coreforce EXO, Kustom Signals ARGUS, LensLock Eagle 13)
emails.shortDescription: Product launch for the new Body Cam Case. Ruggedized protection vs magnet mounts; three mount options (Tek-Lok duty belt, Molle-Loks vest/pack, Shirt Pocket UltiClips); eight colorways. Functional Zero9 voice, no pricing, no warranty mention. Hero EXOBlk.jpg + real ColorID swatch chart.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 6. Product verified live + in stock via .js 2026-07-06 (all variants available). Images 200. Fits standalone EXO platform, not cell-phone-based systems. Colors: Black, OD Green, Ranger Green, Coyote, FDE, Silver Tan, Wolf Grey, Basketweave.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black/red aesthetic, Tomorrow/DM Sans fallback. New Arrival eyebrow, EXOBlk hero, Shop Now CTA first half, Built to Fit compatibility list, 3-col mount options, colorways with real ColorID chart, second Shop Now, Handcrafted Cleveland + 4.9 star trust bar. Distinct layout from Jul 4 bundle.

emails.theme: Happy 4th of July: Build Your Bundle & Save 10%
emails.product: Build Your Bundle (Radio Cases, Flashlight Cases, Body Cam Cases; excludes Swag + Tacvent 2.0)
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July / 250 years. Promote the homepage Build Your Bundle & Save 10% module: add at least 3 cases, save 10%, excludes Swag and Tacvent 2.0. GIF walkthrough of the homepage section + numbered steps, category cards (Radio/Flashlight/Body Cam). Functional voice, no pricing, no warranty.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 2 + homepage screenshot. Bundle builder on homepage. Add at least 3 to fill bundle. Offer excludes Swag + Tacvent 2.0. DESIGNER: embed short GIF screen-recording of the homepage bundle walkthrough.
emails.offerCode: Build Your Bundle: add 3+ cases, save 10%. Excludes Swag + Tacvent 2.0.
emails.creativeDirection: Zero9 black/red/blue, functional voice. Patriotic stripe, measured 250th hero, red 10% OFF bundle block, GIF walkthrough + 4 numbered steps, 3 category cards, Handcrafted Cleveland + 4.9 stars trust bar. No pricing, no warranty.
